subject: Project Management
title: PRINCE2 Goes Global
description: A short lesson to help you apply PRINCE2 Goes Global.

hook.text: PRINCE2 was born in the UK government in 1989 to stop public projects from failing.

buildup.text: It divides projects into stages with clear decision points for senior management.

discovery.text: PRINCE2's strength is governance — every stage needs approval before the next begins.

twist.text: It became mandatory for UK government projects, then spread to 150 countries.

climax.text: PRINCE2 and PMBOK dominate traditional PM — one born in defense, the other in government.

punchline.text: Bureaucracy, done right, is called governance.

quiz.question: What is PRINCE2's core strength?
options: Governance — clear stage gates and approval points
Speed — delivering projects faster than Agile
